authors.author: Aus der Bibel
Evelyn Tarner
Freut euch in dem Herrn allezeit

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Rejoice in the Lord always and again I say, rejoice. Rejoice in the Lord always and again I say, rejoice. Rejoice, rejoice, and again I say, rejoice. Rejoice, rejoice, and again I say, rejoice.
